task:
Build this app in Clear:

**AI Ticket Categorizer** (Level 9)

Build an AI agent that categorizes support tickets. Define a Categorizer agent that returns { category, priority, suggested_action }. Tickets table stores the result. POST /api/tickets receives { subject, description } and returns the categorized ticket.

Starting skeleton:
```clear
build for javascript backend

create a Tickets table:
  subject, required
  description
  category
  priority

# Define a Categorizer agent
# POST /api/t
final_source:
build for javascript backend
database is local memory

create a Tickets table:
  subject, required
  description
  category
  priority
  suggested_action

agent 'Categorizer' receives text:
  result = ask claude 'Categorize this support ticket' with text returning JSON text:
    category
    priority
    suggested_action
  send back result

when user sends ticket to /api/tickets:
  text_to_categorize = (ticket's subject + ' ' + ticket's description)
  categorized = call 'Categorizer' with text_to_categorize
  ticket's category is categorized's category
  ticket's priority is categorized's priority
  ticket's suggested_action is categorized's suggested_action
  saved = save ticket to Tickets
  send back saved with status 201

when user calls GET /api/tickets:
  tickets = get all Tickets
  send back tickets
